raw:
## Completed
Documented the Gate 2 standing rule: CTO must relay the Definition of Done rationale and explain why commit is permitted or withheld before founder approval.

## Files Changed
- `extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md` - added Gate 2 DoD rationale relay rule.
- `extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md` - documented Gate 2 commit rationale and expanded DoD checks.

## How To Verify
```bash
grep -q "Definition of Done" extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md && grep -q "Definition of Done" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md && test -z "$(git diff --name-only -- extensions/foreman .pi/foreman.json | grep -Ev '^(extensions/foreman/AGENTS\.md|extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER\.md)$')" && grep -q "claude-opus-4-8:xhigh" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh
```

Also ran remaining suite scripts: `done_test.sh`, `ship_test.sh`, `gate_flow_test.sh`.

## Notes
When this reaches Gate 2 and the founder approves, the auto-commit message should include the live `Definition of Done:` block.

## MACHINE BLOCK (MANDATORY — end your response with this exact block)

---DEV-JSON---
{
  "summary": "Documented that Gate 2 founder relay must include the Definition of Done rationale explaining why commit is permitted or withheld.",
  "filesChanged": [
    "extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md - added Gate 2 DoD rationale relay rule",
    "extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md - documented Gate 2 commit rationale and expanded DoD checklist"
  ],
  "howToVerify": "grep -q \"Definition of Done\" extensions/foreman/AGENTS.md && grep -q \"Definition of Done\" extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER.md && test -z \"$(git diff --name-only -- extensions/foreman .pi/foreman.json | grep -Ev '^(extensions/foreman/AGENTS\\.md|extensions/foreman/docs/CHARTER\\.md)$')\" && grep -q \"claude-opus-4-8:xhigh\" extensions/foreman/crew/planner.md && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_timeout_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/planner_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/gates_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/reviewer_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/guard_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/fallback_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/test/ledger_test.sh && bash extensions/foreman/dashboard/test/reader_test.sh"
}
---END-DEV-JSON---
